title: Clone Keeper
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Clone Keepers''' were the title given to the [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] and other essential personnel that were operating the sensitive [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]] installation on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] on behalf of the reborn [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. They worked with the [[Dark Side Elite]] and were led by the [[Dark side adept/Legends|Dark Side Adept]] known as the [[Constable of Homunculi]].

{{Imp-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Dark Empire 4|''Dark Empire'' 4]] {{1st}}
*[[Dark Empire 5|''Dark Empire'' 5]]
